SpTU 1, 010 [Ša-zi-ga][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...] x ⸢KA?⸣ [...]

(flake 1') [...] ... [...]

flake 2'2'

[...] x te-en-te-en ki-nud še-ga ⸢ki⸣-nud [...]

(flake 2') [...] ... you cool (down); "(In) the bedroom it is favourable (in) the bedroom [...]

flake 3'3'

[...] še-ga ki-en-gi uriki še-ga še-ga [...]

(flake 3') [...] it is favourable (in) Sumer (and) Akkad it is favourable, it is favourable" [...]

flake 4'4'

[...] ki-en-gi a-ri-a [...]

(flake 4') [...] (in) Sumer, the semen [...]

flake 5'5'

[...] UGAmušen GE₆ SUD₂ ina I₃ gišŠUR.MIN₃ ḪI.ḪI ⸢EN₂⸣ [...]

(flake 5') You pound the [...] of a black raven; you mix (it) with cypress oil; incantation: [...].

flake 6'6'

[...] ⸢SAR?⸣ ina UŠ₂ BURU₅.ḪABRUD.DAmušen NITA ḪI.ḪI ina EREN [...]

(flake 6') You mix (it) with the blood of a male rock-partridge; [...] with cedar; [...]

flake 7'7'

[...] ŠA₃-ka ul i-na-ḫi u₃ ši-i [...]

(flake 7') [...] your desire does not calm and she [...]

flake 8'8'

[...] u₂ṣa-ṣu-un-du u₂A.ZAL.LA₂ u₂KUR.RA u₂ḪAR.SAG LAG.A.ŠA₃.⸢GA?⸣ [...]

(flake 8') [...] ṣaṣundu-plant, azallâ-plant, nīnâ-plant, saffron, camomile [...]

flake 9'9'

[...] NAG-ma ŠA₃.[ZI.GA ...]

(flake 9') You drink [...] and the sexual desire [...].

flake 10'10'

[... ḫa-an]-dur bal-lu-ṣi-ti ina I₃.GIŠ SUD₂ GIŠ₃-šu₂ ŠEŠ₂-ma [...]

(flake 10') You pound [...] the spur of a ballūṣītu-bird with oil; you anoint his penis and [...].

flake 11'11'

[...] x x ḪU ANŠE.KUR.RA e-tel-lu mut-tal-lu-u₂ gišTIR-MEŠ man-nu [...]

(flake 11') [...] ... horse, noble lord of the forests, who [...]?

flake 12'12'

[...] TI ki-i qe₂-e ra-mu-ti it-ba-la ni-iš ŠA₃-⸢ia⸣ [...]

(flake 12') [...] he has taken away my sexual desire, like loosened strings [...]

flake 13'13'

[...] kal u₄-me i-zer-ra-an-ni ina kal mu-ši i-pu-ša₂-an-ni ik-sa-an-ni ki-i ⸢KA⸣ [...]

(flake 13') [...] the whole day, he hates me; during the whole night, he performed (magic) against me; he bound me like [...]

flake 14'14'

[... ra]-mu-ti it-ba-la ni-iš lib₃-bi-ia at-ta lil-li-lu-ka U LI x [...]

(flake 14') [...] he has taken away my sexual desire, [...] loosened [...]; may they purify you, yourself! [...]

flake 15'15'

[...] x qu-ud-du-šu₂-tu DUMU-MEŠ KUR-MEŠ ḫur-sa-[ni ...]

(flake 15') [...] purified ...; sons of the mountains, mountains [...]

flake 16'16'

[...]-ti-im-ma TI KU KA lim-taq-qut KA ⸢KA?⸣ [...]

(flake 16') [...] ... may he keep falling ... [...]

flake 17'17'

[...] x ŠA₃.ZI.GA : DU₃.DU₃-BI u₂GUR₂.GUR₂ ina IZI SAR-šu₂-ma ŠA₃.⸢ZI⸣.[GA ...]

(flake 17') [...] ... sexual desire. : Its ritual: you fumigate (him with) kukuru-wood and sexual desire [...]

flake 18'18'

[...] ⸢BI⸣ ZIu₂ man-nu u₂-ni-⸢iḫ-ka⸣ x [...]

(flake 18') [...] ... is arising; who calmed you down? ... [...]

(end surface missing)
